response.overview: Living in quiet, suffocating normalcy, Kate and Tom appear to be an ordinary couple. But behind closed doors, Kate is stalked by an unseen entity- one that watches, waits, and tightens its grip whenever she tries to reach out. As the presence grows more violent and inescapable, Kate must confront the truth of the monster haunting her home. Is it something supernatural, or something far more real? The Space Between Us is a psychological horror exposing how love can disguise control, and how isolation can be deadly.
response.title: The Space Between Us
